## Summary

Explain the intent (why) and the user-facing impact.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (tokens/keys only in GitHub/Vercel env vars)
- [ ] Docs updated if infrastructure/env vars changed (`docs/`)
